construct_verdict_reason: Most items measure active civic/collective environmental actions, but p34_5 measures passive attendance at informational events rather than active engagement.

items.reason: Signing collective petitions is a direct form of active civic environmental engagement.
Donating to environmental groups is a direct form of active collective environmental engagement.
Participating in protests or demonstrations is a direct form of active civic environmental engagement.
Reporting environmental damage to authorities is a direct form of active civic environmental engagement.
Attending talks or conferences is passive information consumption rather than active civic or collective action in defense of the environment.
